title: Get Transaction Analytics
description: Fetch transaction and conversion data attributed to your campaigns.

steps.title: Understand transaction data
steps.description: Transaction reports track purchases and conversions attributed to your campaign orders. Each transaction includes revenue, impression data, and attribution details.

steps.title: Query transactions with events
steps.description: Fetch transactions attributed to your campaigns. Filter by date range using transactionDate.

steps.title: Calculate totals
steps.description: Sum the revenue field to get total attributed revenue for the period.
steps.tip: The aggregate.count field tells you how many transactions matched your filter.

tips: revenue is the transaction value attributed to the campaign
attrMethod shows how attribution was determined (click, view, etc.)
attrWindow indicates the attribution lookback window in days
Use transactionDate filtering to analyze specific time periods
